effects.effect: You cannot use Attack Skills until the end of your next Turn.

effects.name: Terraforming
effects.effect: Once per turn, after an Attack Skill was used: you can activate 1 Arena Action card from your Deck with a different name than one in your Discard Pile.

effects.name: Mountain Wave
effects.effect: The attacked Vivosaur cannot unrest during the next Charge Phase.

effects.name: Earth Crush
effects.effect: This Attack Skill's FP Cost is -2 for each Arena Action card in your Discard Pile with different names.
